feedItems.description: allocated £165.7m to Children's Social Care (≈£217 per resident)
allocated £41.0m to Roads & Transport (≈£54 per resident)
allocated £308.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£404 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £90 (4.9%) to £1911
